items.title: @EnigmasEnX When is the next gov ufo drop?

@RepLuna @realannapaulina Please stay focused on UAP pressure.

@JeremyCorbell @g_knapp @MichaelLazovsk3 @WeaponizedPod I would encourage you to engage in some good faith conversation with the UFO community on this issue of leaking vs. provocation. If there is a g
